verified.title: Verified Members
verified.body: Our community is built on trust. Every member undergoes a rigorous identity verification process to ensure a secure, elite environment.

public.title: Public-Only Experiences
public.body: All first-time sessions are hosted exclusively in curated, high-traffic venues including boutique lounges and luxury hotel lobbies.

live.title: Live Safety Protection
live.body: Our concierge team monitors active sessions in real-time, providing a discreet layer of protection and instant assistance if needed.

community.title: Respectful Community
community.body: CoBuddy operates on mutual respect and hospitality. Our strict community standards ensure every interaction is refined and professional.

modal.title: Safety Ecosystem
modal.identity_text: All members are required to upload government-issued identification which is cross-referenced with global security databases.
modal.contacts_text: Optionally share your session details and live location with your personal emergency contacts through the app's Guardian feature.
modal.verified_text: Our concierge team personally vets every venue in our catalog to ensure they meet our criteria for visibility, professional staffing, and atmosphere.
